risk_if_not_implemented: Without Alternate Communications Channels, residual security, compliance, or resilience risk may accumulate, potentially leading to control failures or non-compliance.

compensating_control_1.name: Telecommunications Services Availability
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to reduce the likelihood of a single point of failure with primary telecommunications services.
compensating_control_1.justification: Telecommunications Services Availability (BCD-10) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Alternate Communications Channels (BCD-10.4) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Facility applicability. Given the facility and physical environment focus of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Out-of-Band Channels
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to utilize out-of-band channels for the electronic transmission of information and/or the physical shipment of system components or devices to authorized individuals.
compensating_control_2.justification: Out-of-Band Channels (NET-11) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Alternate Communications Channels (BCD-10.4) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Facility applicability. Given the facility and physical environment focus of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
